label: You.com
description: Search the web, images, and news using You.com's search API with a single API key.

form.title: Connect You.com
form.subtitle: Paste your You.com API key to enable web, image, and news search.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste your You.com API key from the api.you.com Dashboard. The simplest and only required step — no OAuth, no setup.
methods.how_to:
## Get your You.com API Key

1. Go to [api.you.com](https://api.you.com) and sign in or create an account.
2. Once logged in, navigate to the **Dashboard** (top navigation or sidebar).
3. Locate the **API Keys** section on the Dashboard page.
4. Click **Create API Key** (or copy an existing key if you already have one).
5. Give the key a name like `Anton` for easy identification.
6. Copy the generated API key — it may only be shown once, so store it somewhere safe.
7. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below and click **Submit**.

## Notes

- Your key grants access to web, image, and news search endpoints depending on your plan tier.
- If you suspect a key has been compromised, revoke it from the Dashboard and generate a new one.
- Rate limits and available endpoints depend on your You.com subscription plan.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found in your You.com API Dashboard at api.you.com. Paste the full key including any prefix.

fields.name: base_url
fields.label: Base URL
fields.description: The You.com API base URL. Leave as default unless you have been given a custom endpoint.
